ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "size_conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country (e.g., UK, EU, US, Japan) */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand (e.g., Nike, Adidas, Levi's) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the garment (e.g., male, female, unisex) */,
  "garment_type" TEXT /* Type of garment (e.g., men's, women's) */,
  "garment_sub_type" TEXT /* Sub-type of the garment (e.g., shirt, pants) */,
  "size_code" TEXT /* Size code (e.g., UK 3, EU 37, US 4) */,
  "size_value" INTEGER /* Corresponding size value in a standard unit (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Human-readable description of the size (e.g., Small, Medium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence of the customer */,
  "preferred_currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency of the customer */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the customer */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the customer in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the customer in pounds */,
  "body_type" TEXT /* Body type of the customer (e.g., slim, athletic, curvy) */,
  "preferred_brand" TEXT /* Preferred brand of the customer */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date when the customer first joined */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "purchase_frequency" INTEGER /* Number of purchases made by the customer */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the recommendation is for */,
  "size_conversion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size conversion used for the recommendation */,
  "garment_type" TEXT /* Type of garment (e.g., men's, women's) */,
  "garment_sub_type" TEXT /* Sub-type of the garment (e.g., shirt, pants) */,
  "recommended_size" TEXT /* Recommended size for the customer */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the recommendation (e.g., 0.8, 0.9) */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  "customer_feedback" TEXT /* Customer feedback on the recommendation */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_size_conversion_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_conversion_id") REFERENCES size_conversions ("size_conversion_id")
)
